question: Which of the following is true for CAAS Class 1 Activity Permit?

options.text: Required for educational UA user flying indoors.
Granted to an organization/individual to assess safe operations of the Unmanned Aircraft (UA) safely.
For UA activities conducted outdoors for purposes that are not recreational or educational in nature.
Required for a recreational UA user flying outdoors above 200ft AMSL.

classification_notes: Class 1 permit conditions are being tested.
